microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing onboarding workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise clients including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining API-driven self-service scheduling requirements that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and transitioned technical execution to a scalable, repeatable model across cross-functional stakeholders.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, delivering a **94% recovery rate** in 4 months by surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous validation model across enterprise infrastructure.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as technical bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, translating complex findings into clear recommendations for non-technical stakeholders.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring end-to-end scheduling workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly improving platform performance and delivery health.

Designed troubleshooting methodologies and SQL-based monitoring tools to proactively identify integration failures across partner systems, improving issue resolution speed and enabling data-driven optimization recommendations for engineering and account teams.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting **technical demos and training sessions** across 14 Azure service teams that drove measurable platform utilization and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Influenced the product roadmap by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams, surfacing critical API and workflow gaps that led to prioritization of **intent-based YAML generation** as a core feature.

Improved data retrieval and technical onboarding by implementing metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search tool**, cutting average lookup time by 83% for internal engineering stakeholders.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Drove product strategy to reduce manual toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact execution paths.

Enabled leadership to prioritize high-impact automation gaps by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil signals across 140+ teams, translating complex backend data into clear, actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.

Translated technical analysis into executive-ready recommendations by synthesizing SQL query outputs and pipeline health metrics into concise optimization strategies, modeling the cross-functional communication skills core to client-facing SE delivery.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping API dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and proactively resolving integration issues before production rollout.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, triaging and resolving **40+ high-priority tickets** to stabilize the developer intake process and maintain continuous delivery health across robotics software deployment pipelines.

Drove technical alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual troubleshooting overhead across distributed station infrastructure.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, implementing a structured CRM process that improved conversion tracking and client onboarding efficiency.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted site conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing Google Analytics tracking, website performance, and local search profile visibility.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering data-driven optimization recommendations to the executive team.
